headline: Memory Chip Prices Will Make or Break DRAM ETF Before Year-End 2026
summary: The Roundhill Memory ETF (CBOE:DRAM) is the first U.S.-listed pure-play memory-chip ETF, and it landed in the middle of one of the most violent upcycles the industry has ever seen. DRAM launched on April 2, 2026 with a 0.65% expense ratio, just as Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) was approaching a trillion-dollar market cap. Micron is up ... headline: How The Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Investment Story Is Evolving Without New Analyst Commentary
summary: Cboe Global Markets enters this update cycle with no change in its current price target, leaving existing expectations in place for now. With no fresh analyst commentary to unpack, the focus shifts to how you, as an investor, can keep track of what might influence the next move in that target. Read on to see how to monitor new information and interpret shifts in the evolving analyst story around Cboe Global Markets. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. headline: Bekaert - Update on the Share Buyback Program and Liquidity Agreement
summary: Update on the Share Buyback Program and the Liquidity Agreement Period from 28 May 2026 to 3 June 2026 Share Buyback ProgramOn 26 February 2026, Bekaert announced the start of the next tranche of its share buyback program, for a total maximum consideration of up to € 75 million. As announced previously, the purpose of the Program is to cancel all shares repurchased.
